items.desc: Private charters or shared trips to fit any group size

items.desc: Chinese and English service for a worry-free fishing adventure

boats.title: Our Fleet
boats.subtitle: Choose from two professionally equipped fishing vessels to match your group size and style

kingfisher.name: Kingfisher 3025 XRS
kingfisher.desc: A 30-foot Canadian-built aluminum fishing machine powered by a 500HP Yamaha outboard. Featuring patented Pre-Flex hull technology for an exceptionally smooth and stable ride even in rough seas. Ideal for small groups seeking a serious fishing experience.

axpor.name: Axopar 37 XC Cross Cabin
axpor.desc: A 37-foot award-winning Finnish-designed luxury sport boat. The fully enclosed heated wheelhouse ensures comfort in all conditions, while the spacious aft deck provides ample room for fishing. Perfect for larger groups and family outings.

booking.title: Book Your Trip
booking.subtitle: Select your boat and date to start your fishing adventure
booking.name: Full Name
booking.depositNote: After submitting, please follow the instructions to pay your deposit: $500 CAD for charter, $100/person for shared

paymentInstructions.wechat: Please add WeChat: haishanghaidiao to transfer the deposit. Include your booking ID in the note.
paymentInstructions.e_transfer: Please send an Interac e-Transfer to info@topfishingcharter.ca with your booking ID in the message.
paymentInstructions.credit_card: We will send a credit card payment link to your email. Please check your inbox.

booking.success: Booking submitted! We'll confirm via SMS shortly.
booking.error: Booking failed. Please try again or contact us directly.

location.title: Boarding Location
location.subtitle: We'll be waiting for you at Steveston Fisherman's Wharf
location.fullAddress: Steveston Fisherman's Wharf, Dock #2, Richmond, BC
location.parking: Ample free parking available near the wharf

policy.title: Booking & Cancellation Terms
policy.subtitle: Please review the following terms before booking

items.title: 72+ Hours Prior Notice
items.desc: Cancellation requests submitted 72 hours or more before the scheduled departure will receive a full deposit refund to the original payment method within 3-5 business days.

items.title: Force Majeure & Weather
items.desc: If the trip is cancelled by the captain due to unsafe weather conditions (winds exceeding 25 knots, heavy rain, dense fog, etc.), clients may choose a full deposit refund or reschedule free of charge to any available date within 30 days.

items.title: Late Cancellation & No-Show
items.desc: Cancellations made within 72 hours of departure are non-refundable; however, one complimentary reschedule may be requested subject to availability. No-shows without prior notice will forfeit the full deposit with no option to reschedule.
